trait.name: Icy Gust
trait.effect: If you don't attack during your turn, you may push or pull a character, summon, or object in range 1-3 spaces equal to the round number + 1. Unlike other pushes or pulls, you can choose the distance pulled.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Great Blizzion
limitBreak.effect:
To your foes, the ice storm you call is a relentless, hungry gale. To you, it is a warm refuge that shields you and your charges from harm.
Effect your turn. Until the start of your next turn, all characters become unable to attack due the strength of snow and wind. All spaces for that duration become obscured and difficult terrain.

keywords.name: Conserve
keywords.description: Can only trigger if you have not attacked this turn, and cannot attack on any turn you trigger this effect.
